summary: Iteration 48: Comprehensive testing of bulk sheet connection feature (toplu otel/acenta bağlantısı). All 11 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI verified for both bulk hotel and bulk agency modals with 3 source methods (Upload, Paste, Master Sheet). Preview validation, error handling, and graceful not_configured behavior all working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/sheets/bulk-template/hotel returns CSV template with correct headers
GET /api/admin/sheets/bulk-template/agency returns CSV template with agency_id column
POST /api/admin/sheets/bulk/preview-text validates hotel rows from pasted text
POST /api/admin/sheets/bulk/preview-text validates agency rows from pasted text
POST /api/admin/sheets/bulk/preview-text shows invalid row when hotel_id doesn't exist
POST /api/admin/sheets/bulk/preview-upload validates hotel rows from CSV upload
POST /api/admin/sheets/bulk/preview-upload handles semicolon delimiter CSV
POST /api/admin/sheets/bulk/preview-master-sheet returns graceful payload when no Google credentials
POST /api/admin/sheets/bulk/execute creates connections and cleanup works
POST /api/admin/sheets/bulk/execute with empty rows returns 400 error
POST /api/admin/sheets/bulk/execute returns conflict error for duplicate hotel
Admin Portfolio Sync page shows Toplu Bağlantı button
Bulk Hotel Modal opens with 3 source tabs (Dosya Yükle, Tablo Yapıştır, Master Google Sheet)
Bulk Hotel Modal shows download template link with correct URL
Bulk Hotel Modal summary cards (Toplam Satır, Geçerli, Hatalı) update after preview
Bulk Hotel Modal paste source preview shows validation errors
Bulk Hotel Modal master sheet source shows graceful not_configured warning
Agency connections section shows Toplu button
Bulk Agency Modal opens with agency_id column in expected columns list
Bulk Agency Modal preview validates hotel_id and agency_id correctly
critical_code_review_comments: All bulk connection endpoints properly validate hotel_id and agency_id against database
CSV parsing correctly handles comma, semicolon, and tab delimiters
Master sheet preview returns graceful not_configured payload when Google Service Account not set
Bulk execute properly returns error_count for duplicate/invalid rows without crashing
Frontend BulkConnectionModal correctly displays validation errors per row
Cleanup after bulk execute works correctly (DELETE /api/admin/sheets/connections/{hotel_id})
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 verified bulk sheet connection feature. Backend endpoints: bulk-template/{scope}, bulk/preview-upload, bulk/preview-text, bulk/preview-master-sheet, bulk/execute all working. Frontend: BulkConnectionModal for hotel and agency scope with 3 source methods (upload, paste, master_sheet). Google Service Account NOT configured - master sheet preview returns graceful not_configured payload. 11 pytest tests + UI verification complete.

mocked_apis.note: Google Sheets API not configured - integration shows graceful degradation with proper user feedback
